promotions.title: 0 Handling Fee for the First Remittance to Chinese Mainland
promotions.highlight: 💰 Zero handling fees on your first mainland China remittance
promotions.description: Customers who log in to the Airstar Bank App and use 'Remit to Chinese Mainland·WeRemit' can enjoy zero handling fee on their first transfer to mainland China. Recipients can receive funds as soon as 1 hour after transfer.
promotions.quota: One-time offer per customer. Limited quota, first come, first served.

promotions.title: Activate Money Safe, Get a Pacific Coffee Voucher
promotions.highlight: ☕ Free HKD30 Pacific Coffee e-Cash Voucher
promotions.description: Customers who log in to the Airstar Bank App and deposit any amount into a 'Money Safe' account will receive a HKD30 Pacific Coffee e-Cash Voucher. Money Safe is an anti-fraud feature that provides stronger protection while still earning Savings/Time Deposit interest rates.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come, first served
promotions.cost: Deposit any amount into a Money Safe account

promotions.title: Travel with Visa Flight Booking Cash Rebate
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Up to HKD800 cash rebate on flight bookings
promotions.description: Visa cardholders can earn cash rebates when using their Registered Eligible Visa Card to pay for air tickets with select airlines via their designated official Hong Kong or Macau websites. Spend HKD8,000+ to get HKD800 cash rebate or HKD4,000-7,999 to get HKD240 cash rebate.
promotions.quota: Maximum $800 cash rebate reward once per eligible cardholder

promotions.title: Bank Securities Transfer 24/7 Service
promotions.highlight: 🔄 24/7 instant securities transfers in multiple currencies
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers 24/7 securities transfer services supporting HKD, USD, and CNY with instant arrival. This allows customers to move their funds between accounts at any time without delays.

promotions.title: Lifetime $0 Commissions on HK Stocks
promotions.highlight: 📈 Trade Hong Kong & US stocks with fractional shares and low fees
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers stock trading services with low fees, fractional shares capability, and global market access. Customers can trade Hong Kong and US stocks instantly through the Airstar Bank platform.

promotions.title: Mobile Account Opening in 5 Minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account via mobile in as fast as 5 minutes
promotions.description: Airstar Bank supports both Hong Kong residents and visitors in Hong Kong to open accounts via mobile phone in as fast as 5 minutes. The entire account opening process can be completed on a mobile device without visiting a branch.
promotions.quota: Available to Hong Kong residents and visitors in Hong Kong

promotions.title: No Account Fees or Minimum Balance
promotions.highlight: 💸 No account management fees and no minimum balance requirements
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers accounts with no account management fees and no minimum deposit balance requirements. This makes banking more accessible without the worry of incurring charges for maintaining low balances.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Savings accounts with multiple currency options and no minimum balance
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers savings accounts with no minimum balance requirement and support for multiple currencies. Customers can hold and manage different currencies in a single account without maintaining minimum balances.

promotions.title: Flexible Time Deposit Placement
promotions.highlight: 🕒 24/7 time deposit placement with flexible tenors
promotions.description: Airstar Bank provides time deposit services with flexible tenor options and 24/7 placement capability. Customers can open time deposits at any time through the mobile app without being restricted by banking hours.

promotions.title: Fractional Shares Investment
promotions.highlight: 🔢 Invest with as little as 1 HK share or US$5 for US stocks
promotions.description: Airstar Bank allows fractional share investing, starting with just 1 share for HK stocks or as little as US$5 for US stocks. This makes investing more accessible to customers who want to start with smaller amounts.
promotions.cost: Minimum investment of 1 share (HK) or US$5 (US)

promotions.title: Personal Loan with Fast Approval
promotions.highlight: 💰 Loan approval and disbursement in as fast as 5 minutes
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers personal loans with approval and disbursement in as fast as 5 minutes. Loans are available with a total amount up to 12 times of monthly salary or HKD1,000,000 (whichever is lower) and personalized APR ranging from 7.43% to 35.05%.

promotions.title: 24/7 Online Banking Services
promotions.highlight: 🕒 Round-the-clock banking services and customer support
promotions.description: Airstar Bank provides 24/7 online banking services and a 24-hour customer hotline service. Customers can access their banking services at any time of day or night without restrictions.

promotions.title: Money Safe Protection with Interest
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced anti-fraud protection while earning regular interest
promotions.description: Money Safe feature provides enhanced protection against fraud losses while still earning regular Savings or Time Deposit interest rates. Funds can only be unlocked with an in-person appointment for additional security.

promotions.title: Personal Loan with Personalized Stellar APR
promotions.highlight: 💳 Personal loans with APR from 7.43% to 35.05%
promotions.description: Personalized loan service with APR ranging from 7.43% to 35.05%. Total loan amount up to 12 times monthly salary or HKD1,000,000 (whichever is lower). Fast approval with loan disbursement in as little as 5 minutes.
promotions.cost: Interest charges based on personalized APR

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Instant Transfers
promotions.highlight: ⚡ 24/7 instant transfers in multiple currencies including HKD and CNY via FPS
promotions.description: Airstar Bank supports transfers in multiple currencies (HKD, USD, CNY, etc.) with 24/7 instant transfer capabilities for HKD and CNY via FPS. Transfers can be made using mobile numbers, email addresses, or account numbers.

promotions.title: Trade Hong Kong & US Stocks Instantly
promotions.highlight: 🔢 Invest in stocks with fractional shares from 1 share or US$5
promotions.description: Start investing with just 1 share for HK stocks or as little as US$5 for US stocks through fractional share investing. Makes diversification accessible for investors with smaller amounts of capital.
promotions.cost: Minimum 1 share (HK stocks) or US$5 (US stocks)

promotions.title: 24/7 Forex Trading
promotions.highlight: 💱 Real-time FX trading available 24/7 in 11 currencies
promotions.description: 24/7 foreign exchange service with real-time quotes and instant trading. Supports 11 currencies including HKD, USD, CNY, and more with immediate transfers after conversion.

promotions.title: Pay Shield Real-Time Fraud Protection
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ 24/7 real-time fraud protection for payments
promotions.description: Airstar Bank Visa Platinum Card offers Pay Shield, a 24/7 real-time fraud protection system. This feature provides an additional layer of security for all payment transactions.

promotions.title: No Minimum Balance Requirement
promotions.highlight: 💳 No account management fees and no minimum deposit
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers savings accounts with no minimum balance requirement. Multi-currency savings options are available with no account management fees.

promotions.title: Pay Shield Real-Time Fraud Protection
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ 24/7 real-time fraud protection for payment transactions
promotions.description: Airstar Bank Visa Platinum Card offers Pay Shield, a 24/7 real-time fraud protection system. This security feature continuously monitors transactions to detect and prevent fraudulent activities, providing cardholders with enhanced payment protection.

promotions.title: eM+ High Yield Account (Libra Savings) Up to 2.0% p.a. Interest Rate
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to 2.0% p.a. interest on your savings!
promotions.description: Customers who successfully upgrade to eM+ High Yield Account (Libra Savings) through the AlipayHK App can enjoy up to 2.0% p.a. interest rate. The 2.0% rate applies to deposit amounts between HKD 200,000-800,000, while deposits up to HKD 200,000 earn 0.5% p.a.
promotions.quota: Available to customers who upgrade to eM+ High Yield Account (Libra Savings)
promotions.cost: Minimum deposit of HKD 200,000 for highest rate

promotions.title: SME Loan Cash Rebate Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💵 Receive up to HKD 100,000 cash rebate!
promotions.description: SME customers can enjoy up to HKD 100,000 cash rebate on their first loan drawdown with Ant Bank. This limited-time promotion is designed to support small and medium enterprises with their financing needs.
promotions.quota: Available for first loan drawdown only

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account Upgrade
promotions.highlight: 💱 Support for HKD, RMB, and USD currencies!
promotions.description: The upgraded savings account now supports multiple currencies including HKD, RMB, and USD. Customers can experience direct transfers from Libra Savings to third-party accounts with increased daily transfer limits of up to HKD 1 million.

promotions.title: Fixed Deposit Early Withdrawal with Zero Penalty Interest
promotions.highlight: 🔓 No penalty fee for early time deposit withdrawals!
promotions.description: Customers can withdraw their entire time deposit before maturity without incurring any penalty fees. This feature offers flexibility to access funds when needed without financial penalties, though partial withdrawals are not permitted.

promotions.title: Low Minimum Fund Investment Threshold
promotions.highlight: 💲 Invest in funds with as little as HKD 1!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers an exceptionally low entry threshold for fund investments, allowing customers to start investing with just HKD 1. This permanent feature makes investing accessible to everyone regardless of their investment capital.

promotions.title: Zero Fund Subscription and Redemption Fee Offer
promotions.highlight: 🔄 No fees for fund subscription and redemption!
promotions.description: Investors can enjoy zero subscription and redemption fees when trading funds on the Ant Bank investment platform. This promotion applies to all available funds, with subscription fees starting from 0% and redemption fees completely waived.

promotions.title: Insurance Premium 100% Rebate
promotions.highlight: 🔙 Enjoy 100% premium rebate!
promotions.description: Customers can enjoy a 100% rebate on their insurance premium when purchasing eligible insurance products through Ant Bank. This offer applies to selected insurance products distributed by Ant Bank as an agent of YF Life Insurance International Limited.

promotions.title: Insurance Products with up to 3.6% Annualized Rate
promotions.highlight: 📈 Up to 3.6% annualized return!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers an annuity plan with guaranteed returns of up to 3.6% per annum. This insurance product is provided by YF Life Insurance International Limited and distributed by Ant Bank as an authorized agent.

promotions.title: HKD $1 Minimum Fixed Deposit
promotions.highlight: 💵 Start a time deposit with just HKD 1!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers time deposits with an exceptionally low minimum deposit amount of just HKD 1. This permanent feature makes time deposits accessible to all customers regardless of their savings amount, supporting both HKD and USD currencies.

promotions.title: Securities Trading Platform with Low/Zero Commission
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Moving towards zero brokerage fee trading
promotions.description: Securities trading service with movement towards zero brokerage fees. Terms and conditions apply, please refer to relevant documents and the bank's financial services charge guide.

promotions.title: One-Stop Hong Kong and US Stock Trading Platform
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Trade Hong Kong and US stocks through a single platform
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a one-stop trading platform connecting Hong Kong and US stock markets, providing global investment opportunities. The platform offers Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, ETFs and other global investment options all in one place.
promotions.quota: Available to Hong Kong residents only (not applicable to mainland and overseas users without Hong Kong resident identity)

promotions.title: One-Minute Investment Account Opening
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open investment account in as fast as 1 minute
promotions.description: Simplified investment account opening process that takes as little as 1 minute to complete. No income proof required, making it quick and convenient for customers to start investing immediately.
promotions.quota: Must be at least 18 years old, not a US or Canadian resident/citizen, and physically in Hong Kong during account opening

promotions.title: Secured Savings Deposit Protection Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Multiple protection layers for your bank deposits
promotions.description: Ant Bank (Hong Kong) has launched the Secure Deposit Service, an anti-fraud measure introduced by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority to provide multiple layers of protection for bank deposits. The service covers Libra Savings and current savings accounts, allowing users to lock spare deposits which cannot be transferred out through any channels or methods.

promotions.title: 3-Minute Securities Account Opening
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open a securities account in as fast as 3 minutes
promotions.description: Customers can open a securities trading account with Ant Bank in as little as 3 minutes. This quick account opening service allows customers to start trading Hong Kong and US stocks quickly, with all services managed through a single app.
promotions.quota: Available to Hong Kong residents only

promotions.title: Ant Bank Global Stock Trading Platform
promotions.highlight: 🌎 One-stop platform for trading Hong Kong and US stocks
promotions.description: Integrated trading platform connecting Hong Kong and US stock markets to capture global investment opportunities. Provides access to Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, ETFs and other global investment options.
promotions.quota: Hong Kong residents only (not applicable to mainland and overseas users without Hong Kong resident status)

promotions.title: Insurance Products with Annual Rate up to 3.6%
promotions.highlight: 📈 Up to 3.6% annual rate on insurance products
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers insurance products with annual rates of up to 3.6%. These insurance plans are products of YF Life Insurance International Ltd. and not Ant Bank, intended for sale in Hong Kong SAR through Ant Bank.

promotions.title: New Ant Bank Investment Fund Platform
promotions.highlight: 🔄 $0 subscription and redemption fees for all funds
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched a new investment fund platform offering funds from leading companies. During this limited-time promotion, customers can enjoy zero subscription fees and zero redemption fees for all funds, providing truly zero-cost investment opportunities.

promotions.title: One-stop Hong Kong and US Stock Trading Platform
promotions.highlight: 🌎 Access to Hong Kong and US stock markets in one platform
promotions.description: A comprehensive trading platform connecting Hong Kong and US stock markets, allowing customers to access global investment opportunities. The platform offers Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, ETFs and other global investment solutions.

promotions.title: Time Deposit with No Early Withdrawal Penalties
promotions.highlight: 🔓 No penalty for early withdrawal of time deposits
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers time deposits with no penalties for early withdrawal. Customers can withdraw their entire time deposit before maturity without incurring any penalty fees, providing flexibility with their savings.

promotions.title: Guaranteed Safe Deposit Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Lock your deposits for enhanced security against fraud
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched the Guaranteed Safe Deposit Service, an anti-fraud measure initiated by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. This service allows customers to lock idle deposits, preventing unauthorized transfers while still earning interest and maintaining deposit protection.

promotions.title: Time Deposit with Early Withdrawal Without Penalty
promotions.highlight: 🔓 Withdraw your time deposit early with zero penalty
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers time deposits with no penalty for early withdrawal, allowing customers to access their funds when needed without financial penalties. Full withdrawal of the deposit is required (partial withdrawals not supported).

promotions.title: Direct Transfer from Libra Savings to Third-Party Accounts
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Transfer directly from Libra Savings to third-party accounts
promotions.description: Customers can now transfer funds directly from their Libra Savings account to third-party accounts through the Ant Bank APP. The daily transfer limit has also been increased to up to HKD 1 million.

promotions.title: Dual-Account Security Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Lock your reserve deposits for enhanced security
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched the Dual-Account Security Service, an anti-fraud measure promoted by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. This service allows customers to lock their reserve deposits, preventing fund transfers through any channel to reduce the risk of fraudulent transactions.

promotions.title: Installment Loan with Fast Approval
promotions.highlight: 💸 Simple loan application with instant fund disbursement
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers installment loans with a simple application process and instant fund disbursement. The service features flexible loan amounts, special low interest rates, a simplified application process, and fast approval and disbursement.
promotions.cost: Loan interest and potential fees apply

promotions.title: Personal Loan with Revolving Credit
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Revolving credit with flexible withdrawal and instant disbursement
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a revolving personal loan product where the credit limit can be reused, allowing flexible withdrawals and instant fund disbursement. Features include easy financial management, simple application, transparent fees, and flexible withdrawals.
promotions.cost: Loan interest and potential fees apply

promotions.title: SGAD (Smart Guarded Account Designation) Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Lock your standby deposits with SGAD for extra security
promotions.description: Ant Bank (Hong Kong) has launched the Smart Guarded Account Designation (SGAD) service, an anti-fraud measure introduced by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. This service allows customers to lock standby deposits which cannot be transferred out through any channels, reducing the risk of fraudulent transfers.

promotions.title: Low Minimum Time Deposit Amount
promotions.highlight: 💰 Open a time deposit with just HKD 1
promotions.description: Ant Bank allows customers to place time deposits with a minimum amount of just HKD 1. This exceptionally low entry threshold makes time deposits accessible to all customers regardless of their financial capacity.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Place time deposits in HKD and USD currencies
promotions.description: Ant Bank's time deposit service supports both Hong Kong Dollar and US Dollar deposits. This multi-currency support allows customers to diversify their time deposits across different currencies.

promotions.title: Securities Trading Commission-Free Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Trade stocks with zero commission fees!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers zero commission on securities trading, allowing customers to trade Hong Kong and US stocks more cost-effectively. This promotion is part of their one-stop securities trading service with bank-level wealth management.
promotions.cost: Free, subject to terms and conditions

promotions.title: Fastee Secure Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced security for your deposits with anti-fraud measures!
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched the Fastee Secure Service, an anti-fraud measure initiated by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. The service allows customers to lock spare deposits that cannot be transferred out through any channels, reducing the risk of fraud while still earning interest.

promotions.title: Open an account in 5 minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in just 5 minutes with HKID and phone number
promotions.description: Open a Fusion Bank account in as little as 5 minutes using just your Hong Kong ID card and mobile phone number. The entire process can be completed before your coffee is ready.
promotions.quota: Hong Kong identity card holder aged 18 or above, non-US person only

promotions.title: Small Change Investment from HKD 1
promotions.highlight: 💰 Start investing with as little as HKD 1
promotions.description: Begin your savings or investment journey with just HKD 1. Whether saving for your next adventure or a personal milestone, Fusion Bank helps you grow your money and explore possibilities.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Transfers in HKD, CNY and USD
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Instant local transfers in HKD, CNY and USD
promotions.description: Transfer funds locally in multiple currencies including HKD, CNY, and USD. Enjoy seamless and instant transfers between accounts in different currencies, all from your smartphone.

promotions.title: Global Remittance Services
promotions.highlight: 🌍 Send money globally from your smartphone
promotions.description: Send and receive money globally with Fusion Bank's remittance service. Buy foreign currency at real-time exchange rates and transfer to international destinations or use for cashless spending via payment networks.

promotions.title: Deposit Protection up to HKD 800,000
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ Deposits protected up to HKD 800,000
promotions.description: Fusion Bank is a member of Hong Kong's Deposit Protection Scheme which protects eligible deposits up to a maximum of HKD 800,000 per depositor.

promotions.title: Flash Monday High-Interest HKD Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: 🔥 Special high-interest rates for HKD time deposits on Mondays
promotions.description: Take advantage of Fusion Bank's Flash Monday promotion offering elevated interest rates for Hong Kong Dollar time deposits. This special rate is only available on Mondays for a limited time.

promotions.title: Savings Interest Plus
promotions.highlight: 💲 Enhanced interest rates for savings accounts
promotions.description: Earn higher interest on your savings with Fusion Bank's Savings Interest Plus promotion. Get more from your deposits with boosted interest rates for a limited time.

promotions.title: Foreign Currency Exchange Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💱 Bonus interest rates for foreign currency exchanges
promotions.description: Enjoy special bonus interest rates when you exchange currencies with Fusion Bank. This promotion applies to exchanges between HKD, USD, and RMB with no upper limit on transaction amounts.

promotions.title: Foreign Exchange Rewards Campaign
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Special rewards for foreign currency exchange
promotions.description: Special promotion for customers exchanging currencies with Fusion Bank. The campaign includes benefits for exchanging between HKD, USD, and CNY with no upper limit on transaction amounts.

promotions.title: Foreign Exchange Time Deposit Bonus Interest
promotions.highlight: 📈 Bonus interest on foreign currency time deposits
promotions.description: Enhanced interest rates for time deposits in foreign currencies. Available for customers who exchange and deposit foreign currencies including USD and RMB with Fusion Bank.
promotions.quota: No upper limit on deposit amount

promotions.title: Fixed Deposit Bonus Interest for Foreign Currency Exchange
promotions.highlight: 💱 Special exchange rates and time deposit bonus interest
promotions.description: Promotional offer for foreign currency exchange featuring bonus interest rates on time deposits. Includes currency exchange between USD, HKD, and RMB with no upper limit on transaction amount.

promotions.title: Foreign Currency Time Deposit Interest Rate Boost
promotions.highlight: 🔼 Enhanced interest rates for foreign currency time deposits
promotions.description: Special promotion offering boosted interest rates for time deposits in foreign currencies. Available for customers exchanging currencies and placing them in time deposits.

promotions.title: liviSave Preferential Savings Rate
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn preferential savings rate with no minimum deposit required
promotions.description: liviSave offers a special preferential savings rate for customers who add funds to their account. No minimum deposit is required to enjoy this rate. This promotion is available to all liviSave account holders.

promotions.title: Fast and Free FPS Transfers
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Fast and free transfers to anyone at any time
promotions.description: Send money instantly to anyone using FPS (Faster Payment System) at no cost. This service allows customers to complete transfers quickly at any time, providing maximum convenience.

promotions.title: QR Code Payments across Hong Kong
promotions.highlight: 📱 Fast and secure QR payments at merchants across Hong Kong
promotions.description: Use QR code payments for a fast and secure shopping experience at merchants throughout Hong Kong. The service offers a convenient way to make purchases with enhanced security features.

promotions.title: 100% Online Account Opening
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Open an account quickly and easily from anywhere on your app
promotions.description: Customers can open a liviSave account completely online with no need for complicated documents. The process is quick and easy, allowing customers to join anytime and anywhere through the app.

promotions.title: livi Rewards Universe Program
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Join livi's reward program for special perks and offers
promotions.description: The livi Rewards program (賞宇宙) offers special perks, benefits and offers to livi customers. Members can enjoy various rewards and exclusive promotions through this program.

promotions.title: liviSave No Minimum Balance
promotions.highlight: 💸 No fees and no minimum deposit requirements
promotions.description: Open a liviSave account without worrying about fees or minimum balance requirements. This account caters to both paying and saving needs, offering complete flexibility for customers.

promotions.title: QR Cash Withdrawal
promotions.highlight: 💵 Withdraw cash using QR codes
promotions.description: Use QR codes for cash withdrawals, offering a convenient alternative to traditional ATM cards. This feature provides a quick and secure way to access your money.

promotions.title: liviSave No Fees Account
promotions.highlight: 🆓 No fees and no minimum deposit required
promotions.description: Open a liviSave account with no fees and no minimum deposit balance requirements. The account caters to both paying and saving needs with complete flexibility.

promotions.title: Universal Voyage Travel Insurance Plan
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Comprehensive travel insurance protection
promotions.description: livi offers the Universal Voyage Travel Insurance Plan to provide protection during your travels. This plan covers various travel-related risks and emergencies for customers.

promotions.title: Easy HomeCare Insurance
promotions.highlight: 🏠 Protection for your home with Easy HomeCare
promotions.description: livi provides Easy HomeCare insurance plan to protect customers' homes and belongings. This insurance product offers coverage for various home-related risks and damages.

promotions.title: Pet Care Insurance
promotions.highlight: 🐾 Insurance coverage for your beloved pets
promotions.description: livi offers Pet Care insurance plan to help cover veterinary expenses and other pet-related costs. This plan provides financial protection for pet owners when caring for their furry family members.

promotions.title: livi Flexi Personal Loan
promotions.highlight: 💸 Flexible personal loan solutions
promotions.description: livi Flexi Loan offers personal loan options with flexible terms to meet various financial needs. The loan product provides customers with access to funds for personal expenses with customizable repayment schedules.
promotions.cost: Interest rates and fees not specified

promotions.title: livi Flexi Balance Transfer
promotions.highlight: 💱 Transfer outstanding balances with flexible terms
promotions.description: livi offers a Balance Transfer option under their Flexi Loan product to help customers consolidate existing debts. This service allows transferring balances from other financial institutions to livi with potentially more favorable terms.
promotions.cost: Interest rates and fees not specified

promotions.title: livi Business SME Financing
promotions.highlight: 🏢 Financing solutions for small and medium enterprises
promotions.description: livi Business offers SME Financing options to help small and medium-sized businesses access capital for growth and operations. This financing solution is designed specifically for the needs of SME customers.
promotions.cost: Interest rates and fees not specified

promotions.title: BOC Chill Card
promotions.highlight: 💳 Special benefits with the BOC Chill Card
promotions.description: livi offers the BOC Chill Card for customers looking for payment solutions with added benefits. This card provides various privileges and features for cardholders' everyday spending needs.

promotions.title: BOC Mastercard Debit Card
promotions.highlight: 💳 Convenient spending with BOC Mastercard Debit Card
promotions.description: livi provides the BOC Mastercard Debit Card that allows direct access to funds in customers' accounts. This card offers worldwide acceptance and secure payment options for daily transactions.

promotions.title: Money Safe Rewards
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Special rewards for keeping your money safe
promotions.description: livi offers 'Money Safe Rewards' (智安存獎賞) program that provides benefits to customers for maintaining security measures. This program rewards customers for practicing safe banking habits.

promotions.title: No Minimum Deposit Requirement
promotions.highlight: 🆓 No fees and no minimum balance requirements
promotions.description: Open and maintain a liviSave account with no minimum deposit requirement and no maintenance fees. This feature makes the account accessible to everyone regardless of their financial situation.

promotions.title: Pay your tax with Mox Credit Card, split and earn cash reward
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to HKD500 cash reward on tax payments
promotions.description: Pay your tax bill with Mox Credit Card and apply for Instalment to spread the payment. Complete this during the promotion period to earn up to HKD500 in cash rewards.

promotions.title: Tax Season Instant Loan with Low APR
promotions.highlight: 💸 Enjoy loan rate as low as 1.18% + up to HKD10,888 cash reward
promotions.description: Apply for a designated Instant Loan through the Mox app with personalized quotation to instant disbursement. Successfully complete the application during the promotion period to earn up to HKD10,888 cash reward.

promotions.title: Keeta Exclusive Flash Sale Discount
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Enjoy up to HKD80 off orders on Keeta
promotions.description: Order from Keeta with your Mox Card to enjoy an exclusive discount of up to HKD20 off per order, saving up to HKD80 for the whole month. Also includes surprise vouchers and welcome rewards for home parties.

promotions.title: Xiaomi Shopping Cash Rebate and Installment Offer
promotions.highlight: 📱 Up to 7% total cash rewards at Xiaomi + 0% Instalments
promotions.description: Shop at mi.com or any Xiaomi Store with Mox Credit Card to get up to 5% extra cash rebate (capped at HKD450) plus up to 12-month 0% interest instalments. Combined with standard up to 2% Unlimited CashBack for total rewards up to 7%.
promotions.quota: New customers can earn up to HKD2,150 cash bonus
promotions.cost: Purchase at Xiaomi with required spend

promotions.title: Mox Journey from Scratch Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💥 Scratch & win up to reward worth HKD8,888
promotions.description: Take on any of five simple challenges to get a Mox Scratch Card with instant prize reveal. Complete more challenges to multiply chances of winning the top prize of HKD8,888 (HKD8,000 SOL(s) + HKD888 cash reward).

promotions.title: Indulge and Grow Bonus Deposit Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💼 Deposit your bonus and get a chance to win a 1-month "free lunch"
promotions.description: Deposit your bonus into Mox to earn great interest and get a chance to win a 1-month "free lunch". Each HKD10,000 deposited gives one entry into the lucky draw, increasing chances with higher deposits.

promotions.title: Mox x csl 'Best-in-Town' Exclusive Plan Offer
promotions.highlight: 📱 Get up to HKD1,380 rebates + free NowTV Pass
promotions.description: Sign up for a new csl plan or renew an existing one with Mox Credit Card autopay to enjoy an HKD180 monthly fee rebate plus a free Now TV beIN SPORTS Super Pack 1-Month Pass (valued at HKD188).

promotions.title: Travel Pick & Go Eggstra Care+ Free Add-on Coverage
promotions.highlight: ✈️ FREE add-on coverage with Travel Pick & Go insurance
promotions.description: Apply for Travel Pick & Go insurance during the promotion period to receive 1 FREE add-on coverage. This helps safeguard your trip from the financial stress of unexpected events.
promotions.cost: Purchase of Travel Pick & Go insurance required

promotions.title: MOXTRAVEL New Customer Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Earn up to 28,500 miles through spending and saving
promotions.description: New customers who enter invitation code "MOXTRAVEL" to open a Mox account and apply for a Mox Credit Card can earn up to 28,500 miles through spending and saving - enough for a round-trip flight to Asia.
promotions.cost: Credit card application and spending required

promotions.title: Samsung S26 Series Exclusive Offer at The Club
promotions.highlight: 📱 HKD100 off Samsung S26 series at The Club
promotions.description: Spend HKD1,800 or more on The Club with Mox Credit Card and enter promo code CLUBMOX2026 to enjoy an instant HKD100 discount. This is in addition to the standard up to 2% Unlimited CashBack.
promotions.cost: Minimum spend HKD1,800 at The Club

promotions.title: Uber Taxi Ride Spending Reward
promotions.highlight: 🚕 Up to HKD90 off Uber Taxi Rides
promotions.description: Pay for Uber Taxi rides with Mox Card to enjoy HKD10 off each ride per month during the promotion period. Exclusive promo code must be claimed and used for eligible rides.

promotions.title: MOXDEPO Time Deposit Invitation Code Promotion

promotions.quota: Available to all existing ZA Bank customers

promotions.title: New Customer Welcome Reward and StockBack Bonus
promotions.highlight: 🌟 New users earn 2.5% in stock rewards on first HKD 10,000 spend
promotions.description: New ZA Bank users who select the StockBack x ZA Card rewards program can enjoy an additional 1% stock rebate on their first HKD 10,000 of eligible transactions within 30 days of account opening. This stacks with the current 1.5% promotion for a total 2.5% rebate.
promotions.quota: New ZA Bank users only who have never held any ZA Bank product or service
promotions.cost: Minimum spend of HKD 10 per transaction

promotions.title: 20% p.a. HKD Time Deposit for New Customers (Deposit Condition)
promotions.highlight: 💹 Enjoy 20% p.a. on 7-day HKD time deposit after first deposit
promotions.description: New customers who deposit at least HKD 1,000 within 14 days of account opening can receive a +19.9% p.a. 7-day HKD time deposit interest rate booster coupon via ZA Quest. When combined with the base interest rate, customers can enjoy a total interest rate of 20% p.a.
promotions.quota: New customers referred through the referral program

promotions.title: Free Crypto Trading Platform Fee for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🪙 $0 platform fee for the first 90 days after account opening
promotions.description: New customers who open a ZA Bank account can enjoy $0 platform fee when trading cryptocurrencies for the first 90 days after account opening. This allows new users to trade 24/7 directly with HKD or USD deposits without platform fees.
promotions.quota: New customers only; first 90 days after account opening

promotions.title: ZA Card No Annual Fee
promotions.highlight: 💳 Zero annual fees and hidden charges on ZA Card
promotions.description: ZA Card comes with no annual fees or hidden charges. The Visa debit card truly belongs to the customer with no recurring costs, and supports digital payment methods including Apple Pay and Google Pay.

promotions.title: ZA Bank 24/7 Banking Service
promotions.highlight: 🕒 Banking services available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
promotions.description: ZA Bank provides round-the-clock banking services, allowing users to access their accounts and perform banking operations at any time without time constraints. Services include deposits, transfers, and foreign exchange.
promotions.quota: Available to all ZA Bank customers

promotions.title: ZA Bank 0% Brokerage & 0% Custody Fees for Stock Trading
promotions.highlight: 📈 0 brokerage and 0 custody fees for Hong Kong stocks
promotions.description: Trade Hong Kong stocks with zero commission and zero custody fees. Platform fee is as low as HKD 18 per transaction, allowing users to save up to HKD 1,000 in monthly trading costs compared to traditional brokers.
promotions.quota: All ZA Bank users with activated stock trading services
promotions.cost: Platform fee as low as HKD 18 per transaction

promotions.title: ZA Bank x Wise Express Remittance
promotions.highlight: 🚀 Fast international transfers via Wise integration
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers express remittance service powered by Wise for HKD payments. This allows for faster international transfers compared to traditional methods.
promotions.quota: All eligible ZA Bank account holders

promotions.title: Loan Approval in as fast as 90 seconds
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Loan approval results in as fast as 90 seconds
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers a simple loan application process with approval results in as fast as 90 seconds. Loans of up to HKD 1,000,000 are available with annualised percentage rates as low as 1.30%.
promotions.quota: Eligible borrowers based on credit assessment

promotions.title: Insurance Application in as Fast as 3 Minutes
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ Apply for insurance in as fast as 3 minutes via smartphone
promotions.description: In partnership with ZA Insure, ZA Bank offers a quick insurance application process that can be completed in as fast as 3 minutes via smartphone. Coverage options include life insurance, critical illness insurance, and Voluntary Health Insurance Scheme (VHIS).

promotions.title: HK Stock Cash Rebate up to HKD 1,000
promotions.highlight: 💵 Earn up to HKD 1,000 cash rebate on stock purchases
promotions.description: Selected ZA Bank customers can receive up to HKD 1,000 cash rebate when they purchase stocks. Users can claim stock cash rebate vouchers via ZA Quest and apply them to their stock purchases to receive the cash rebate benefits.

promotions.title: New User HKD 500 Cash Reward
promotions.highlight: 💵 Get up to HKD 500 cash reward when opening a new account
promotions.description: Selected customers can receive up to HKD 500 in cash rewards when opening a new ZA Bank account. Customers can complete specific tasks in ZA Quest after successful account opening to receive the reward.
promotions.quota: Selected new customers only; not applicable to customers who opened accounts through referral programs or have received other new customer gifts

promotions.title: ZA Card with No Annual or Hidden Fees
promotions.highlight: 💳 Zero annual fees and no hidden charges
promotions.description: ZA Card is a Visa debit card with no annual fees or hidden charges. It also supports Apple Pay and Google Pay for convenient mobile payments.

promotions.title: New Account HKD 2,026 Welcome Reward
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Get rewards worth HKD 2,026 plus 2.5% stock rebate
promotions.description: New users who open an account using a referral code can receive rewards worth HKD 2,026 including fund position rebate vouchers and stock cash rebate vouchers. Additionally, they can enjoy 2.5% stock rebate on eligible purchases.

promotions.title: ZA Bank Welcome Offer with Code ZAUT66
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Receive HKD 2,026 in rewards and 20% p.a. HKD time deposit
promotions.description: New customers using the invitation code ZAUT66 can enjoy rewards worth HKD 2,026 and 20% p.a. interest rate on HKD time deposits. The offer includes various vouchers and interest rate boost coupons.

promotions.title: ZA Bank Account Opening in as fast as 2 minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in as fast as 2 minutes
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers a streamlined account opening process that allows customers to open an account in as little as 2 minutes. The service is available to both Hong Kong residents and visitors in Hong Kong with zero deposit requirements.

promotions.title: Fund Redemption Fee Waiver
promotions.highlight: 🆓 Redemption fee waivers for all funds
promotions.description: ZA Bank customers who have activated fund trading services can enjoy redemption fee waivers for all funds until July 31, 2026. This allows investors to redeem their fund investments without paying any redemption fees.
promotions.quota: All retail banking users who have activated fund trading services

promotions.title: ZA Bank Payment Connect Cross-Border Transfer
promotions.highlight: 🌏 Fee-free real-time transfers between Mainland China and Hong Kong
promotions.description: Send money between Mainland China and Hong Kong in real-time with zero fees using Payment Connect. Instant cross-border transfers without any handling charges.

promotions.title: New Stock Trading Customer Cash Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💵 Up to HKD 1,500 in cash rewards for new stock traders
promotions.description: New users can receive up to HKD 500 in cash rewards for opening an account, plus up to HKD 1,000 in cash rebates for buying stocks. This offer is specifically for Hong Kong stock trading customers.
promotions.cost: Must buy stocks to qualify for portion of rewards

promotions.title: Second 20% p.a. Time Deposit for Multi-Product Usage
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Additional 20% p.a. time deposit for using multiple products
promotions.description: New referred customers who hold deposits, funds, and stocks with a total balance of at least HKD 1,000 within 14 days of opening an account can receive an additional +19.9% p.a. 7-day HKD time deposit interest rate booster coupon, providing a second opportunity to enjoy 20% p.a. interest.
promotions.quota: New referred customers using multiple products

promotions.title: Fund Position Rebate Vouchers for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🧾 Receive HKD 800 in fund position rebate vouchers
promotions.description: New customers can receive fund position rebate vouchers worth HKD 800 (including one HKD 780 voucher and one HKD 20 voucher). These vouchers are valid for 30 days after receipt and can be used to offset fund investment costs.
promotions.quota: New customers who open accounts with referral codes

promotions.title: Currency Exchange Discount Voucher
promotions.highlight: 💱 Receive HKD 126 currency exchange discount voucher
promotions.description: New customers can receive a HKD 126 currency exchange discount voucher valid for 30 days after receipt. This voucher can be used to reduce the cost of currency exchange transactions within ZA Bank.
promotions.quota: New customers who open accounts with referral codes

promotions.title: Group Lai See Feature
promotions.highlight: 🧧 Send Group Lai See with one tap without entering recipients individually
promotions.description: Users can distribute Lai See (red packets) to groups with a single tap, eliminating the need to enter recipients individually. This convenient feature simplifies the traditional practice of sending red packets during holidays and special occasions.
